title: ophrys lutea subsp. battandieri
intro: Ophrys lutea subsp. battandieri, also known as the Yellow Bee Orchid, is a rare and endangered subspecies of orchid native to North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ophrys lutea subsp. battandieri include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and calming the nervous system, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis, anxiety, and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
